title: LootFilter
description: A high-performance loot filter designed for competitive play. Automatically clears junk from your inventory while protecting your gear and keeping your slots optimized for combat.
body:
### Overview
**LootFilter** is a high-performance, lightweight inventory management tool designed for **Fabric 1.21.1-1.21.11** Unlike basic loot filters that just toss items away, this mod is built specifically for competitive play and **PvP**, ensuring your essential gear stays safe while your inventory stays clean of junk.

### ✨ Key Features
## 🛡️ Intelligent Inventory Protection:
 When you toggle the mod **ON**, it takes a snapshot of your current inventory. Every item you are currently holding is marked as **"Protected"** and will never be dropped. The filter only applies to **new items** picked up after the mod is active.

### 🌐 Universal Server Compatibility:
 Engineered to work on **all multiplayer servers**(or almost all). It uses specialized packet handling **(Sync ID 0)** to bypass common anti-cheat restrictions that block inventory interactions while menus are closed.

## ⚙️ Fully Customizable Keep List:
 Use the in-game menu to toggle common gear (**Netherite, Diamond, Totems**, etc.) or add any specific item name to your custom "Always Keep" list.

## ⚡ Adjustable Drop Speed:
 Fine-tune how fast the mod clears your inventory with a dedicated **delay slider** to ensure you stay under the radar on high-security servers.

### ⌨️ Keybinds
K: Open the Configuration Menu

M: Toggle LootFilter ON/OFF

### 🚀 How to Use
Organize your inventory exactly how you want it.

Press K to configure which items you want to keep and set your preferred **drop delay**.

Press M to enable the filter. Your **current items** are now locked!

As you pick up **new loot**, the mod will automatically discard anything that isn't on your **"Keep"** list.

### 📋 Requirements
- **Fabric Loader**

- **Fabric API** (**Required**)

- **Mod Menu (Highly Recommended**
